rubric.en:
**4** (1p): [UP|DE] What can you say about the execution of the next program?
**5** (1p): [DE] Which one of the following statements is a valid index operator definition?
**6** (1p): What will happen when the next program is executed?
**7** (1p): [DE] What is the output when the following program is executed?
**8** (1p): [UP] How to create instances of the TEST class?
**9** (1p): What does the program display?
**10** (1p): [DE] Which one of the following statements about the execution of the next program is true?
**11** (1p): How will this application behave?
**12** (1p): [UP] What claims are true about the following class diagrams?
**13** (1p): [UP] What principles are violated in the next class diagram?
rubric.ro:
**4** (1p): [UP|DE] Ce puteti spune despre executia urmatorului program?
**5** (1p): [DE] Care dintre urmatoarele declaratii este o forma corecta de a defini un operator de indexare?
**6** (1p): Ce se intampla la executia urmatorului program?
**7** (1p): [DE] Ce afiseaza executia urmatorului program?
**8** (1p): [UP] Cum se pot crea instante la clasa TEST?
**9** (1p): Ce afiseaza urmatorul program?
**10** (1p): [DE] Care dintre urmatoarele afirmatii referitoare la executia urmatorului program este adevarata?
**11** (1p): Cum se va comporta urmatorul program?
**12** (1p): [UP] Care afirmaţii sunt adevărate despre următoarea diagramă de clase?
**13** (1p): [UP] Ce principiu nu e respectat în proiectarea claselor din diagramă?
